title: Sales Support
description:
Job Title: Sales Support / Sales Administration Executive

Location: Singapore

Company: Goldden International Singapore

Salary Range: SGD 2,200 – 2,800 per month (based on experience)

Eligibility: Singapore Citizens and Singapore Permanent Residents only

Experience: 1–3 years

Education: Diploma or above

About Goldden International Singapore

Goldden International Singapore is a strategic consulting firm under a regional financial services group. We operate two key business lines:

  1. Private Client Solutions – We serve high-net-worth individuals and families, offering bespoke services such as family office setup, family trust structuring, large-sum life insurance planning, and cross-border asset protection strategies.
  2. Institutional Services – Supported by group companies holding a Capital Markets Services (CMS) license and corporate secretarial license, we assist financial institutions—especially from Mainland China—in launching funds through our Singapore platform and obtaining relevant financial licenses for market entry.

Position Summary

We are seeking a detail-oriented and dependable Sales Support Executive to provide administrative and operational support to the sales team. This role focuses primarily on administration, documentation, coordination, and internal support to ensure smooth execution of sales activities.

The ideal candidate has 1–3 years of experience in an administrative or sales support role, preferably within a financial services or insurance environment.

Key Responsibilities

  • Provide daily administrative and sales support to the sales team
  • Assist in preparing sales documents, proposals, quotations, and onboarding materials
  • Maintain and update client records, sales trackers, and internal databases
  • Coordinate meetings, appointments, and follow-ups for sales staff
  • Support documentation filing, record-keeping, and basic contract administration
  • Liaise with internal teams (operations, compliance, finance) to support sales processes
  • Track application or case progress and follow up on required client documents
  • Perform ad-hoc administrative duties as assigned

Key Requirements

  • 1–3 years of experience in sales support, administration, or coordination roles
  • Prior experience in a financial services firm, insurance company, or related industry is preferred
  • Diploma or above in Business Administration, Finance, or a related field
  • Strong organizational skills with attention to detail
  • Ability to handle multiple tasks and meet deadlines
  • Good command of English; Mandarin is an advantage
  • Proficient in Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint)
  • Responsible, service-oriented, and able to work well in a team
